notes: Physical dimensions: 1.26in H x 7.40in W x 6.54in D (half-rack width, ~3/4U tall). Not a rack-mount device as shipped — Crestron describes mounting as freestanding, surface mount, or single-rack-rail only; rackUnits omitted. AirMedia Series 3 wireless presentation receiver. Also has a microSD card slot (no matching connector enum) used for digital signage content caching. Unit is powered either by the LAN PoE+ port (IEEE 802.3at Class 4) or by the optional 24 VDC power pack via dc-barrel.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: Type A; accepts HDMI, DVI, and DisplayPort signals (with adapter)

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Type A; HDMI digital video/audio output

ports.name: Audio Out
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm terminal block; balanced/unbalanced stereo, 4 Vrms balanced / 2 Vrms unbalanced

ports.name: RS-232/COM
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm terminal block; bidirectional RS-232 at up to 115.2k baud

ports.name: IR/Serial Out
ports.note: 2-pin 3.5mm terminal block; 1-way IR output at 1.1 MHz or TTL/RS-232 at 19.2k baud

ports.name: LAN PoE+
ports.note: 100Base-TX/1000Base-T; IEEE 802.3at Class 4 PoE+ powers the unit; primary network connection

ports.name: USB Type A (x2)
ports.note: One USB 2.0 host and one USB 3.0 host port for peripherals

ports.name: USB Type B
ports.note: USB 3.0 device port; used as computer console connection

ports.name: Power
ports.note: 24 VDC at 1.25 A via 2.1x5.5 mm barrel connector; optional if powered via LAN PoE+
